'''vahaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oakum|oakum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oakum|oakum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vahaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væhæzæth|væhæzæth]] || [[word:væhæzæj|væhæzæj]] || [[word:væhæzæsh|væhæzæsh]] || [[word:væhæzæ|væhæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vahahazath|vahahazath]] || [[word:vahahazaj|vahahazaj]] || [[word:vahahazash|vahahazash]] || [[word:vahahaza|vahahaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vahazath|vahazath]] || [[word:vahazaj|vahazaj]] || [[word:vahazash|vahazash]] || [[word:vahaza|vahaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vahafzafth|vahafzafth]] || [[word:vahafzafj|vahafzafj]] || [[word:vahafzafsh|vahafzafsh]] || [[word:vahafzaf|vahafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vahazatha|vahazatha]] || [[word:vahazaja|vahazaja]] || [[word:vahazasha|vahazasha]] || [[word:vahazaka|vahazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vahazath|vahazath]] || [[word:vahazaj|vahazaj]] || [[word:vahazash|vahazash]] || [[word:vahaza|vahaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vahazathal|vahazathal]] || [[word:vahazajal|vahazajal]] || [[word:vahazashal|vahazashal]] || [[word:vahazakal|vahazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vahazaathatha|vahazaathatha]] || [[word:vahazaajaja|vahazaajaja]] || [[word:vahazaashasha|vahazaashasha]] || [[word:vahazaaka|vahazaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vahazathan|vahazathan]] || [[word:vahazajan|vahazajan]] || [[word:vahazashan|vahazashan]] || [[word:vahazakan|vahazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vahazathaoro|vahazathaoro]] || [[word:vahazajaoro|vahazajaoro]] || [[word:vahazashaoro|vahazashaoro]] || [[word:vahazakaoro|vahazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
